name: Q4792770
abstract: Armando Ghitalla (June 1, 1925 – 14 December 2001) was an American orchestral trumpeter. He studied at the Juilliard School, and performed in the New York City Opera, the New York City Ballet, and the Houston Symphony.

works.t: Trumpet Concerto No. 2 in D Major, MWV 6.33
Sonata for Trumpet and Cello, Op. 21
Sonata for Trumpet, Winds, and Strings
Sonata for Trumpet and Strings in D Minor

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Porrello
about_quotes.evidence: I took a couple lessons with Armando Ghitalla and the first thing he asked me, I played something and he liked it
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Porrello interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 6, 2023
